claim_statement: QFT-like dynamics emerge from coherent node excitations with Klein-Gordon-type propagation.
method: Estimate effective operators from stochastic update ensembles and compare with claimed emergent forms.
pass_condition: Controlled regime reproduces claimed Schrodinger-like / Klein-Gordon-like effective behavior.
fail_condition: No stable emergent operator class consistent with the stated claim.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_p3_symbolic_validation.py --test-id QNG-T-047 --claim-id QNG-C-096 --mode qm_qft --dataset-id DS-004 --derivation "03_math/derivations/qng-c-096.md" --formula-anchor "Phi(x,t)=sum_i phi_i(t) delta(x-x_i)" --seed 3047 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-047"

decision.note: QM/QFT ensemble diagnostics pass delta-fit, signature, and stability gates for emergent operators.
